context: Cloud-API frontier-judge re-eval (task #122 round 7) post iter-275 v8 engine promotion + iter-336 PHI source-scan lock-in. Companion to round-6 local-LLM run (composite 7.56 on n=5/6 Ollama Q4_K_M judges). Round-7 uses xAI Grok 4.1 fast-reasoning, Mistral Large, DeepSeek-Chat, Perplexity Sonar Pro, NVIDIA Nemotron Ultra 253B — frontier-tier reasoning models for higher-quality signal.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: Differentiation from Epic Sense, Hippocratic AI, OpenEvidence relies on claims without direct benchmarks or head-to-head comparisons.
Clinical advisor attestation provided but lacks detailed review report or independent validation beyond self-reported metrics.
No UI screenshots, live demo visuals, or design details in submission package to assess density, hierarchy, or consistency.

strengths: Outstanding reproducibility with Q16.16 bit-identical replay and full audit chains verifiable across architectures.
Comprehensive documentation including JUDGES.md with 5-minute audits and 1371 pinned tests demonstrating production-grade rigor.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: Lacks novel CS contributions beyond BitNet b1.58 adaptation and deterministic replay; architecture is robust but not groundbreaking.
While differentiated from Epic/Sense/Hippocratic, the six-model LLM consensus is not uniquely novel compared to existing multi-agent systems.
Clinical advisor attestation is strong, but lacks formal FDA Q-Sub engagement or published clinical validation studies.
Information density is high, but lacks a polished, clinician-ready UI with EHR-grade visual hierarchy and brand consistency.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 reproducibility primitive with FDA defensibility (10/10 in reproducibility_fda_defensibility).
Comprehensive test coverage (1371 tests) with CI integration and audit-chain pinning (10/10 in test_coverage_evidence).
Exceptional documentation polish (JUDGES.md, README depth, FDA Q-Sub draft readiness) (10/10 in documentation_polish).
Apache-2.0 license with explicit patent grant and no buried clauses (10/10 in license_ip_clarity).
Six-layer clinical safety pipeline with deterministic veto anchor and 100% recall on contraindicated pairs (9/10 in clinical_credibility).

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: No live interactive demo or video walkthrough showing the 5-second comprehension hero flow with a clear call-to-action.
No screenshots or UI mockups provided; information density and brand consistency cannot be assessed from text alone.
The six-model LLM consensus and deterministic table approach, while solid, do not clearly differentiate from existing clinical decision support systems like Epic Sense or OpenEvidence.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 fixed-point replay with SHA-256 repro_hash across any architecture — a genuine FDA SaMD reproducibility primitive.
1371 tests green with CI reproducibility-manifest check; comprehensive test coverage across engine and scripts.
Apache-2.0 with explicit patent grant and single LICENSE file — production-deployable IP clarity.
Clinical advisor with valid NPI, 21 CFR Part 11 audit trail, FHIR R4 coverage, and 100% recall on contraindicated drug pairs.
arch-mind L1 governance gate and typed runtime invariants for PHI discipline and federation integrity.
